description_long: This awning features a pitched, triangular roof with a reddish-brown shingled canopy supported by a robust wooden frame. The frame consists of two vertical posts anchored at the base, connected by a horizontal beam and decorative curved braces that add both structural integrity and visual interest. The canopy is solid in color, with no visible patterns or embellishments, and the edges are finished with a straight trim. The support structure is entirely made of wood, with the posts appearing to be set on small concrete or stone footings for stability. The overall design is simple yet sturdy, suitable for placement at the entrance of a building, garage, or walkway in an urban environment.
description: A pitched, reddish-brown shingled awning with a sturdy wooden frame and straight-edged trim, supported by two vertical posts and decorative braces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular roof, wooden frame, and decorative braces beneath the canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the shingled canopy and the depth of the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the pitched roof and the supporting posts, with less visible decorative detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the canopy and frame.
attribute_mounting_location: freestanding, typically placed at entrances or along walkways
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with posts and beams
